stemHtml: A pilot during the pre-flight planning procedure uses an aeronautical chart to find the magnetic variation. Which statement is correct regarding the magnetic variation at a specific position?

options.a: Although the magnetic poles move over time, local variation remains constant.
options.b: Volcanic activity causes magnetic variation to increase, any given geographic area.
options.c: Magnetic variation changes over time, due to displacement of magnetised materials in the earth.
options.d: The rise of mean sea level due to global warming causes magnetic variation to increase or decrease.
